diffs.diff:
--- a/check_ckpt.py
+++ b/check_ckpt.py
@@ -0,0 +1,21 @@
+import torch

+ckpt = torch.load('checkpoints/ensemble.pt', map_location='cpu')

+print(type(ckpt))

+if isinstance(ckpt, list):

+    print(f'List of {len(ckpt)} items')

+    for i, item in enumerate(ckpt):

+        if isinstance(item, dict):

+            print(f'  Item {i}: keys={list(item.keys())}')

+        else:

+            print(f'  Item {i}: type={type(item)}')

+elif isinstance(ckpt, dict):

+    print(f'Dict keys: {list(ckpt.keys())}')

+

+print()

+ckpt2 = torch.load('checkpoints/best.pt', map_location='cpu')

+print('best.pt type:', type(ckpt2))

+if isinstance(ckpt2, dict):

+    print(f'  keys: {list(ckpt2.keys())}')

+    for k,v in ckpt2.items():

+        if k != 'model_state_dict':

+            print(f'  {k}: {v}')
